generated_assessment.reasoning: Very high openness combined with low extraversion and high neuroticism suggests skepticism toward mainstream institutions and a tendency toward independent, critical information seeking. The elevated anger-hostility and anxiety make distrust in mainstream journalism more likely, while the high trust facet of agreeableness tempers this to a moderate level of opposition rather than outright rejection.
